ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team associated with these stats */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the season */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "games_behind" REAL /* Games behind the first place team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  "regular_season_mvp" INTEGER /* ID of the Most Valuable Player (MVP) for the regular season */,
  "playoff_mvp" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP for the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_playoff_mvp FOREIGN KEY ("playoff_mvp") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_regular_season_mvp FOREIGN KEY ("regular_season_mvp") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the season in which the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "home_team_mvp" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP for the home team */,
  "away_team_mvp" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_home_team_mvp FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_mvp") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_away_team_mvp FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_mvp") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player is on */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_estimated" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, out for the season) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
